seo.title: Discover Wayanad | Activities & Local Attractions | 50Fables
seo.description: Explore the wonders of Wayanad from 50Fables. Visit Thirunelli Temple, Tholpetty Wildlife Sanctuary, and local waterfalls. Experience the best of Wayanad nature.

attractions.title: Thirunelli Temple
attractions.description: It is an ancient temple dedicated to Lord Maha Vishnu beside the Brahmagiri hills in Kerala.

attractions.title: Tholpetty
attractions.description: Wayanad Wildlife Sanctuary is spread across 344 square kms with four ranges namely Sulthan Bathery, Muthanga, Kurichiat and Tholpetty.

attractions.title: Karlad Lake
attractions.description: Karlad Lake is located in Thariode, which is around 16 km away from Kalpetta.

attractions.title: Kanthampara Falls
attractions.description: A beautiful waterfall situated about 22 km away from Kalpetta.

attractions.title: Chembra Peak
attractions.description: Hike up the rugged terrains of the Chembra Peak located 2,100 metres above sea level on the southern part of Wayanad.

experiences.title: Wayanad's Enchanted Trails
experiences.description: Explore lush trails through the ancient Western Ghats with experienced naturalists who'll share stories of local tribes and the region's rich flora and fauna.

experiences.title: Vast Spice Plantation Routes
experiences.description: Hit adrenaline-pumping trails winding through rolling hills of coffee, cardamom, and pepper, offering thrilling descents and panoramic vistas

experiences.title: The Serene Kabini Backwaters
experiences.description: Glide down scenic backwaters surrounded by wildlife and stunning natural views, offering a peaceful glimpse into rural life near the Kabini River.

experiences.title: Edakkal Cave History
experiences.description: Lay back under a clear, open sky and explore the constellations, or discover the prehistoric rock art and ancient history within the famous Edakkal Caves.
